forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 43. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 70. Southwest wind 10 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph.

weather_report:
As dawn gently breaks over Boston, the night yields its grasp to a slate-gray blanket of clouds, softly dappled and initiating the day with a hushed ambiance. The current temperature rests comfortably in the low 40s, making the air feel brisk yet inviting. A southwest wind brushes against the skin at a teasing pace, urging one to don a light jacket or sweater before embarking into the city. Those who rise early may take solace in the serenity of the streets, where the last tendrils of night still linger, leaving the lights of the city twinkling like distant stars.

By midday, expect the clouds to part and reveal a refreshing expanse of mostly sunny skies, draping the day in warmth with temperatures approaching a delightful 70 degrees. As the wind picks up to a lively 10 to 20 mph, it carries with it the promise of adventure—perhaps a leisurely stroll through the Public Garden or savoring a coffee at an outdoor café, where the vitality of spring is tangible. The gusts may occasionally playfully tousle one’s hair, sending forth a reminder of the season’s vigor. So, embrace layers; a light coat in the morning gives way to a short-sleeve shirt as the sun ascends higher. Today is marked not just by the transition from night to day, but by the whispers of opportunity for simple joys, allowing one to soak in the rich narrative of urban life unfolding before them.
